issues.description: Missing condition on Leader being active. The effect text says 'You may give your 1 active Leader −5000 power', which means the Leader must be active to use this effect. The DSL should have a condition checking that the Leader is active.

Missing optional/cost structure. The effect uses 'You may... : Give' syntax which indicates the first power reduction is a cost to activate the second effect. The DSL should represent this as an optional cost-effect relationship, not two simultaneous actions.
